title: dirca palustris
intro: Dirca palustris, also known as American False Goldenseal or Greenleaved Spirea, is a perennial shrub native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Dirca palustris include reducing fever, soothing respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant protection, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Dirca palustris include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
